design_system.rule: one action title and one evidence object per slide

qa_checklist: Every content slide has an action title.
Reading action titles alone tells the argument.
Every metric-bearing claim cites a local evidence source.
Generated images are decorative/explanatory only and contain no fake metrics.
A references/artifact-index appendix exists after the conclusion slide.
The final non-appendix slide is a conclusion, not a thank-you slide.

slides.claim: The project turns PHAK Chapter 4 into an evidence-grounded GraphRAG demo.
slides.speaker_note: Open with the problem, the source document, and the advisory boundary.
slides.title: Ontology-constrained GraphRAG makes aviation handbook answers auditable

slides.claim: The project can explain what it does, why each component exists, and how results are evaluated.
slides.speaker_note: Frame the work as a reproducible research prototype.
slides.title: The course goal is answered by a full evidence pipeline, not a single model call

slides.claim: Each answer can be traced through chunks, KG triples, retrieval mode, and citations.
slides.title: The pipeline preserves traceability from PDF text to grounded answers

slides.claim: The active ontology has 35 classes and 9 object properties.
slides.speaker_note: Explain why the baseline ontology is not the main narrative object.
slides.title: A curated ontology keeps the KG explainable enough to defend

slides.claim: Fixed-window KG has 172 triples; structure-aware KG has 448 triples.
slides.speaker_note: Stress evidence/provenance validation rather than raw triple count.
slides.title: KG extraction is useful only because every triple is validator-gated

slides.claim: Best strategy: structure_aware with Recall@5=1.0 and MRR@5=0.82.
slides.speaker_note: Explain handbook structure, not just the metric ranking.
slides.title: Structure-aware chunking is the best current retrieval candidate

slides.claim: Structure-aware hybrid Recall@5=1.0 and KG coverage=0.9.
slides.speaker_note: Defend why a graph layer matters even when vector Recall is high.
slides.title: GraphRAG should be judged as structured evidence, not just page Recall

slides.claim: Structure-aware hybrid supports 9 answers versus 8 for fixed-window hybrid.
slides.speaker_note: Use this as the strongest experiment-level defense claim.
slides.title: Evidence-level scoring favors the structure-aware hybrid run

slides.speaker_note: Show answer, chunks, KG triples, KG graph, and Why This Result.
slides.title: The web demo turns raw evidence into an inspectable explanation surface

slides.claim: Gold labels are reviewed for source alignment; the next hardening step is external review, CI, and broader document coverage.
slides.speaker_note: Be explicit about what the project does not prove yet.
slides.title: Current limitations define the next evaluation work

slides.claim: Learning and decision-support only; not a POH, checklist, ATC, instructor, or pilot-judgment substitute.
slides.speaker_note: Say the full advisory boundary before and after the demo if asked about real flight use.
slides.title: The assistant is for aviation learning support, not operational authority

slides.claim: The work is defensible because its claims are linked to artifacts, metrics, and reproducibility commands.
slides.speaker_note: End on this slide for Q&A.
slides.title: The final contribution is an auditable prototype and a reproducible experiment protocol

slides.claim: All deck claims map back to local source files, reports, and generated evidence artifacts.
slides.speaker_note: Use this appendix slide only when asked where a metric or artifact came from.
slides.title: The artifact index makes the experiment reproducible after the talk

visual_assets.prompt_role: AI aviation GraphRAG research cover; no embedded text.
visual_assets.purpose: Apple-style title-slide cover visual for the defense deck.

visual_assets.prompt_role: AI aviation GraphRAG pipeline hero; no embedded text.
visual_assets.purpose: Large pipeline hero visual for PDF -> chunks -> KG -> Hybrid RAG.

visual_assets.prompt_role: AI aviation KG evidence component; no embedded text.
visual_assets.purpose: Reusable KG evidence visual for ontology and GraphRAG slides.

visual_assets.prompt_role: AI web demo mockup; abstract placeholder text only.
visual_assets.purpose: Apple-inspired web demo mockup for the interface explanation slide.
